title: Lightning sword
description: Hey, I'm qzwars just started learning how to make plugins. This is my first one you can use /op and then  /lightningsword which gives you a netherite sword you can right click and if an entity or block is in your view it strikes it excluding the dragon!
body:
⚡ **Lightning Sword**

Bring the power of the storm straight into your hands! The Lightning Sword plugin adds a ***special weapon*** that lets players call down lightning just by right-clicking. When you right click with this blade, it targets the entity or block you’re looking at and unleashes a bolt of lightning, complete with sound, particles, and real damage. It’s got a short cooldown to keep things balanced, but still feels insanely powerful to use.

Server operators can use /lightningswordgive to instantly get the sword in-game. Once given, anyone can use it — the sword behaves like a normal Netherite weapon for regular attacks but gains its lightning ability on right-click. The plugin is lightweight, built for Paper 1.21+, and doesn’t require any resource packs since it uses the standard Netherite sword texture.








**Please join my discord server for support and other plugins!**
